parsed_review.summary: CP00-171 cleanly extends the RP04 Master Data closeout chain with a Risk A failure-taxonomy sensitive-entry-boundary descriptor pack (10 units, RP04.P07.M05.S19-RP04.P07.M06.S06). All new code is pure, in-memory, frozen descriptor construction with no side effects: no runtime permission evaluation or audit mutation (evaluates_runtime_permission/appends_audit_event false), no Hermes execution (emits_hermes_evidence/executes_hermes_command false; createMasterDataCp171HermesEvidencePacket only returns a descriptor string), no Claude prompt sending (sends_claude_prompt/executes_claude_review false; ClaudeReviewPacket only emits questions and required_model/effort=claude-opus-4-8/max read_only), no human review/approval dispatch (dispatches_review_route/dispatches_approval_route false), and no case-note writes (writes_case_note false across attestation, freeze result, and catalog all_no_write check). Customer-facing summaries expose only descriptor_key, category, safe_error_code, customer_visible, escalation_required, descriptor_only; the leak_guard's 15 internal_reference_fields (incl. source_descriptor_key, matter_payload, resource_payload, internal_prompt/note, foreign_tenant_id) and 23 prohibited_outputs are verified absent via own-property and serialized-substring checks, with self-validating catalog flags (all_customer_surfaces_trimmed, all_internal_refs_evidence_only, missing_matter_resource_payloads_trimmed) and tests confirming source_descriptor_key/matter_payload/resource_payload are not own-properties. Unit accounting is internally consistent (boundary 4 + entry 6 = 10; deliverable 1+1+1+1+6; micro-phase M05:4/M06:6; titles 10x1). Contract v0.16, registry binding, validators, tests, and the contract-projection drift checks (ordered JSON.stringify) are aligned, and acquires_runtime_lock/implements_ldip/splits_hrx_product are false. HRX remains embedded and LDIP is not implemented. No P0-P3 issues; pack is production-ready.

boundary_assessment.notes: CP00-171 builds frozen sensitive entry boundary descriptors only; package code does not load real data, execute runtime permission checks, audit appends, route dispatch, API handlers, UI rendering, AI retrieval, analytics, Hermes, Claude, retry, rollback, locks, or case-note writes.
